title: Entrepreneur-in-Residence (EIR) – Social Impact
description:
Company Overview

We’re not just building startups, we’re solving global challenges. Wu Song Capital is a venture studio and early-stage VC fund focused on education, social impact (ESG), and tech. If you’re passionate about creating change and love the hustle, this is your chance to shape the future.


Job Description

This isn’t your typical job. As an EIR at Wu Song Capital, you’ll own a startup from Day 1, whether it’s your idea or a venture we’ve sketched out. You’ll start lean, with interns and a barebones team, and build something impactful from the ground up. This role is designed for the doers, the dreamers, and those who know that creating real change requires perseverance, creativity, and a whole lot of grit.


Key Responsibilities

  • Create Your Venture: You’ll launch and run a business, leading every aspect of its development
  • Bootstrapping to Scaling: Begin with interns and limited resources but scale your team and operations as you grow
  • Innovate & Build: Develop strategies that will challenge the status quo, create market entry plans, and scale impact across Asia
  • Lead a Movement: Bring your team together as you grow from an agile startup to a purpose-driven organization
  • Network & Fundraise: Engage with customers, partners, and investors, and raise funds to propel your venture forward
  • Embrace the Hustle: This is not a cushy corporate gig, it’s a grind that requires resilience and resourcefulness every day


Qualities an EIR Must Possess

  • Purpose-Driven Hustler: You’re driven by making an impact, not just by profits. You’re creative, adaptable, and excited to rough it out to build something that matters
  • Ownership Mentality: You thrive on freedom and responsibility, taking full charge of your business
  • Resilience & Grit: Startups are tough, and you’re tougher. You bounce back stronger, ready to overcome any challenge
  • Experience as a founder or exec is great, but we care more about your entrepreneurial energy and willingness to hustle


What We Offer

  • Equity = Your Reward: You’re here for the upside. Significant equity means you benefit from your startup’s long-term growth.
  • Basic Allowance, Big Impact: We’ll cover essentials with a modest allowance, but the real payoff comes from building something incredible.
  • Freedom to Lead: Complete autonomy to drive your venture and create real social impact.
  • Access to Resources & Community: We’ve got the network, mentors, and investors to help fuel your growth.
  • Adventure Built In: Whether you’re working remotely or traveling Asia, this is your chance to shape a bold new future.


Application Process

Ready to change the world? Email your resume and 2-pager teaser of your idea to careers@wusongcapital.com. We want dreamers, doers, and anyone who believes in creating lasting impact.


Stipend

$800 - $2,400

postedCompany.description: Wu Song Capital is a boutique private investment office headquartered in Singapore, with a growing presence across Asia. We invest in startups, mature businesses, and impact-driven ventures through a combination of M&A, venture capital, and special situations.
postedCompany.name: WU SONG CAPITAL PTE. LTD.
